name: trends-aggregator
title: Trends Aggregator - Google, Reddit, HN, GitHub, Product Hunt
description: Free Exploding Topics & BuzzSumo alternative. Aggregate trending topics from 5 sources in one run: Google Trends (with traffic volume & region filtering), Hacker News, Reddit, GitHub trending repos, and Product Hunt. Structured JSON output. No API keys required. Perfect for content marketing, SEO trend-jacking, and competitive intelligence.
